testcase.name: test_real_weight_prefill_decode_matches_current_optimized[blackhole-1x4-12]

failure.message: AssertionError: real layer12 prefill versus optimized TTNN: 0.9753307864709148 assert False

testcase.failure:
mesh_device = MeshDevice(1x4 grid, 4 devices), layer_idx = 12
@pytest.mark.parametrize("layer_idx", [SLIDING_LAYER, FULL_LAYER]) @parametrize_mesh_with_fabric([TARGET_MESH_SHAPE]) def test_real_weight_prefill_decode_matches_current_optimized( mesh_device, device_params, layer_idx, ): del device_params seq_len = 17 path = _real_reference_path(layer_idx) if not path.is_file(): pytest.fail( f"missing {path}; run test_capture_real_weight_current_single_chip_optimized_reference " "in an isolated 1x1 process first" ) reference = torch.load(path, weights_only=True) with _functional_helpers_for_layer(layer_idx): config = functional_test._config() state = functional_test._real_state() decoder = _decoder( state, config, mesh_device, layer_idx=layer_idx, max_cache_len=128, multichip_config=_multichip_candidate_config_from_env(), ) key_cache, value_cache = decoder.create_kv_cache() page_table = decoder.create_page_table([1, 0]) generator = torch.Generator().manual_seed(17000 + layer_idx) hidden = torch.randn((1, 1, seq_len, config.hidden_size), generator=generator, dtype=torch.bfloat16) token = torch.randn((1, 1, 1, config.hidden_size), generator=generator, dtype=torch.bfloat16) prefill = decoder.prefill_forward( _replicated(hidden, mesh_device), key_cache=key_cache, value_cache=value_cache, page_table=page_table, ) > _assert_pcc( reference["prefill"], _replicated_host(prefill), 0.99, f"real layer{layer_idx} prefill versus optimized TTNN", )
models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:1947: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
reference = tensor([[[[ -1.4531, 2.9375, 0.4453, ..., -0.5000, 21.1250, 22.0000], [ 0.8750, -2.0781, 5.8438,...-5.9375], [ 16.8750, 10.5625, -2.9688, ..., -22.7500, 19.6250, 7.7812]]]], dtype=torch.bfloat16) actual = tensor([[[[ -0.7188, -1.9688, 6.4375, ..., -5.8125, 20.7500, 22.1250], [ -1.3750, -3.8750, 10.4375,...13.0625], [ 14.5000, 9.3750, -7.4062, ..., -25.2500, 21.8750, 9.2500]]]], dtype=torch.bfloat16) threshold = 0.99, label = 'real layer12 prefill versus optimized TTNN'
def _assert_pcc(reference: torch.Tensor, actual: torch.Tensor, threshold: float, label: str): passed, message = comp_pcc(reference.float(), actual.float(), pcc=threshold) print(f"{label}: {message}") > assert passed, f"{label}: {message}" E AssertionError: real layer12 prefill versus optimized TTNN: 0.9753307864709148 E assert False
models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:103: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_real_weight_prefill_decode_matches_current_optimized[blackhole-1x4-13]

failure.message: AssertionError: real layer13 prefill versus optimized TTNN: 0.969783490564154 assert False

testcase.failure:
mesh_device = MeshDevice(1x4 grid, 4 devices), layer_idx = 13
@pytest.mark.parametrize("layer_idx", [SLIDING_LAYER, FULL_LAYER]) @parametrize_mesh_with_fabric([TARGET_MESH_SHAPE]) def test_real_weight_prefill_decode_matches_current_optimized( mesh_device, device_params, layer_idx, ): del device_params seq_len = 17 path = _real_reference_path(layer_idx) if not path.is_file(): pytest.fail( f"missing {path}; run test_capture_real_weight_current_single_chip_optimized_reference " "in an isolated 1x1 process first" ) reference = torch.load(path, weights_only=True) with _functional_helpers_for_layer(layer_idx): config = functional_test._config() state = functional_test._real_state() decoder = _decoder( state, config, mesh_device, layer_idx=layer_idx, max_cache_len=128, multichip_config=_multichip_candidate_config_from_env(), ) key_cache, value_cache = decoder.create_kv_cache() page_table = decoder.create_page_table([1, 0]) generator = torch.Generator().manual_seed(17000 + layer_idx) hidden = torch.randn((1, 1, seq_len, config.hidden_size), generator=generator, dtype=torch.bfloat16) token = torch.randn((1, 1, 1, config.hidden_size), generator=generator, dtype=torch.bfloat16) prefill = decoder.prefill_forward( _replicated(hidden, mesh_device), key_cache=key_cache, value_cache=value_cache, page_table=page_table, ) > _assert_pcc( reference["prefill"], _replicated_host(prefill), 0.99, f"real layer{layer_idx} prefill versus optimized TTNN", )
models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:1947: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
reference = tensor([[[[-18.7500, -1.7344, -14.0000, ..., 28.5000, -3.9375, 20.6250], [ -9.8125, -28.7500, -5.4062,...57.0000], [ 38.7500, 24.3750, 16.3750, ..., -8.0000, 22.8750, 7.1562]]]], dtype=torch.bfloat16) actual = tensor([[[[-10.6250, 4.0625, -9.5625, ..., 33.0000, -2.8125, 21.3750], [ -7.9375, -30.6250, -10.3125,...64.0000], [ 49.5000, 28.0000, 40.5000, ..., -2.2812, 24.6250, 5.0312]]]], dtype=torch.bfloat16) threshold = 0.99, label = 'real layer13 prefill versus optimized TTNN'
def _assert_pcc(reference: torch.Tensor, actual: torch.Tensor, threshold: float, label: str): passed, message = comp_pcc(reference.float(), actual.float(), pcc=threshold) print(f"{label}: {message}") > assert passed, f"{label}: {message}" E AssertionError: real layer13 prefill versus optimized TTNN: 0.969783490564154 E assert False
models/autoports/openai_gpt_oss_20b/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:103: AssertionError
